name: High Cultist Vexthar the Consumed
description: A gaunt figure in black robes adorned with silver Aethel glyphs. Shadow corruption visibly courses through his veins like black lightning. His eyes are completely black abysses. Once a scholar like Marcus, he has gone far deeper into the Blight's embrace - willingly, eagerly. He is the true architect of the ritual, and the Shadow Blight's chosen vessel.

attacks.name: Corrupted Staff
attacks.description: An ancient Aethel staff pulsing with shadow corruption

attacks.name: Blight Bolt
attacks.description: A lance of concentrated Shadow Blight energy

attacks.name: Shadow Corruption Wave
attacks.description: A wave of Shadow Blight that corrupts all it touches, reducing max HP

attacks.name: Life Siphon
attacks.description: Drains life force from target, healing Vexthar for half the damage dealt

movement.notes: Moves deliberately, favoring positions near the portal for power

special_abilities.name: Shadow Aura
special_abilities.description: All enemies within 3 tiles take 1d4 necrotic damage at the start of each turn

special_abilities.name: Blight Empowerment
special_abilities.description: When standing adjacent to the portal, Vexthar gains +2 to all damage rolls and +10 temporary HP per turn

special_abilities.name: Manifest Blight Horror
special_abilities.description: When HP drops below 50%, summons 1-2 lesser blight spawn from the portal

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance
special_abilities.description: Can choose to succeed on a failed saving throw (3/day)

special_abilities.name: Corruption Touch
special_abilities.description: Attacks may inflict shadow corruption, reducing max HP by 1d4 until long rest

special_abilities.name: Scholar's Cunning
special_abilities.description: Vexthar prioritizes high-threat targets and uses tactical positioning

behavior.notes: Epic boss-tier enemy. Uses Blight Bolt for single high-priority targets, Shadow Corruption Wave for groups, Life Siphon when wounded. Extremely intelligent - stays near portal when possible for empowerment. Will summon reinforcements when bloodied. Ruthless and fanatical.
